info.title: DataForSEO API
info.description: DataForSEO API endpoints exposed through the AIsa unified gateway.

get.summary: Get Google Organic SERP Results by id
get.description: Get Google Organic SERP Results by id. Retrieve regular task results for a posted task within 30 days at no extra charge.

x-doc.desc_en: Identifier (UUID) of the previously posted task whose results you want to retrieve.
x-doc.title_zh: 此前提交、要获取其结果的任务的标识（UUID）。

version.description: API version

x-doc.desc_en: Version of the DataForSEO API that produced this response, e.g. `0.1.20240101`. Handy for reproducibility and support tickets.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成本次响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `0.1.20240101`，便于复现与提交工单。

x-doc.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole response. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure (auth, quota, malformed payload) — see `status_message`.
x-doc.title_zh: 整个响应的总体状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其它值表示请求级失败（鉴权、配额、报文格式等），详情见 `status_message`。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable text for `status_code`: `Ok.` on success, or the failure reason otherwise.
x-doc.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读文本，成功为 `Ok.`，否则为失败原因。

x-doc.desc_en: Total server-side processing time for the response, as a duration string such as `0.1234 sec`.
x-doc.title_zh: 服务端处理本次响应的总耗时，形如 `0.1234 sec` 的时长字符串。

x-doc.desc_en: Total amount charged for this request in USD, aggregated over all tasks in the response.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次请求按美元计的总费用，为响应内全部任务费用之和。

tasks_count.description: Number of tasks returned

x-doc.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array.
x-doc.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的任务对象数量。

tasks_error.description: Number of tasks returned with an error

x-doc.desc_en: Number of tasks that finished with an error; `0` means all tasks succeeded.
x-doc.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量，`0` 表示全部任务成功。

x-doc.desc_en: Container array holding one object per task, each carrying its own status and `result` payload.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务容器数组，每个元素对应一个任务，内含各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

x-doc.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to download the completed result.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。传给对应的 `task_get` 接口即可下载已完成的结果。

x-doc.desc_en: Result payload array for this task; element shape depends on the endpoint (SERP items, task references, locations, languages, etc.).
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务的结果数组，元素结构随接口而异（SERP 条目、任务引用、地区、语言等）。

x-doc.heading_zh: 获取 Google 自然搜索结果（regular） get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_get_regular_id
x-doc.desc_en: Retrieves the regular (lightweight) result of a previously posted Google Organic SERP task by its task id. Results stay retrievable for 30 days at no extra charge.
x-doc.description_zh: 按任务 id 获取此前提交的 Google 自然搜索（Organic）任务的 regular（精简）结果，结果 30 天内可免费重复拉取。

x-doc.heading_zh: 获取 Google 自然搜索结果（advanced） get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_get_advanced_id

x-doc.heading_zh: 列出可领取的 Google 自然搜索任务 get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_tasks_ready
x-doc.desc_en: Lists Google Organic SERP tasks that have finished and are ready to collect, returning the endpoints to fetch each one.
x-doc.description_zh: 列出已完成、可领取的 Google 自然搜索任务，并给出获取每个任务结果的端点。

post.description: Live Google Organic SERP HTML. Returns raw HTML immediately. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.

x-doc.title_zh: 页面结果项数组，每个元素封装一份渲染后的 HTML SERP 页面。

x-doc.desc_en: Raw HTML markup of the rendered Google SERP page.
x-doc.title_zh: 渲染后的 Google SERP 页面的原始 HTML 标记。

url.description: Direct URL of the search query

x-doc.desc_en: Direct Google search URL to parse instead of building the query from keyword/location/language parameters. Use one or the other.
x-doc.title_zh: 直接给出要解析的 Google 搜索 URL，替代用 keyword/location/language 拼装查询；两种方式二选一。

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

x-doc.desc_en: Full location name to target, e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`. Provide either `location_name`, `location_code` or `location_coordinate`.
x-doc.title_zh: 要定位的完整地区名称，如 `London,England,United Kingdom`。`location_name`、`location_code`、`location_coordinate` 三者择一。

x-doc.desc_en: Numeric location code to target; obtainable from the matching `.../locations` endpoint. Provide either `location_name`, `location_code` or `location_coordinate`.
x-doc.title_zh: 要定位的数字位置码，可从对应的 `.../locations` 接口获取。与 `location_name`、`location_coordinate` 三者择一。

x-doc.desc_en: GPS coordinates to target, formatted as `latitude,longitude` (optionally with radius). Alternative to `location_name`/`location_code`.
x-doc.title_zh: 以 `纬度,经度`（可附半径）格式给出的 GPS 坐标定位，替代 `location_name`/`location_code`。

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

x-doc.desc_en: Full language name to use, e.g. `English`. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
x-doc.title_zh: 要使用的完整语言名称，如 `English`。与 `language_code` 二选一。

x-doc.desc_en: Language code to use, e.g. `en`; obtainable from the matching `.../languages` endpoint. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
x-doc.title_zh: 要使用的语言码，如 `en`，可从对应的 `.../languages` 接口获取。与 `language_name` 二选一。

x-doc.desc_en: Device the SERP is emulated on, typically `desktop` or `mobile`.
x-doc.title_zh: 模拟抓取 SERP 所用的设备类型，通常为 `desktop` 或 `mobile`。

x-doc.desc_en: Operating system to emulate for the chosen device, e.g. `windows`, `macos`, `android`, `ios`.
x-doc.title_zh: 为所选设备模拟的操作系统，如 `windows`、`macos`、`android`、`ios`。

x-doc.desc_en: Custom Google domain to query, e.g. `google.co.uk`, overriding the domain inferred from location.
x-doc.title_zh: 自定义要查询的 Google 域名，如 `google.co.uk`，覆盖由地区推断出的默认域名。

x-doc.desc_en: Number of SERP results to parse. Larger depth returns more results and may cost more.
x-doc.title_zh: 要解析的 SERP 结果条数。深度越大返回越多，费用也可能更高。

x-doc.desc_en: Maximum number of SERP pages to crawl for this query.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次查询最多抓取的 SERP 页面数。

search_param.description: Additional parameters of the search query

x-doc.desc_en: Additional raw Google search parameters appended to the query (e.g. URL query-string fragments).
x-doc.title_zh: 追加到查询上的额外原生 Google 搜索参数（如 URL 查询串片段）。

x-doc.desc_en: When true, additionally loads the asynchronously-rendered AI Overview block of the SERP.
x-doc.title_zh: 为 true 时，额外加载 SERP 中异步渲染的 AI Overview 区块。

x-doc.desc_en: When true, expands the AI Overview item to capture its full expanded content.
x-doc.title_zh: 为 true 时，展开 AI Overview 条目以抓取其完整展开内容。

x-doc.desc_en: User-defined label stored with the task and echoed back in results, for your own correlation.
x-doc.title_zh: 随任务保存并在结果中回显的用户自定义标签，供你自行关联对账。

x-doc.heading_zh: 实时获取 Google 自然搜索 HTML 页面 post_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_live_html
x-doc.desc_en: Runs a Google Organic SERP query in live mode and returns the rendered search results page as raw HTML in a single synchronous call.
x-doc.description_zh: 以实时模式执行 Google 自然搜索查询，单次同步调用直接返回渲染后的搜索结果页面（原始 HTML）。
